## ✅ Pre-Merge Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project style guide
- [ ] No `console.log` or debug code

- [ ] TypeScript strict mode pass
- [ ] No new lint warnings

### Tests

- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passes
